title: Flea Treatment in Morris Heights, Bronx | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Morris Heights, Bronx. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Free quotes. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Morris Heights home or apartment? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Morris Heights and the surrounding Bronx neighborhoods. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Morris Heights residents for years with same-day and next-day service options. We understand the unique challenges of flea control in multi-family buildings and private homes throughout the Bronx, offering affordable, effective treatments with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Morris Heights' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, townhouses, and newer residential developments along the Grand Concourse and near University Heights Bridge creates diverse environments where fleas can thrive. Our technicians are familiar with the specific pest control needs of Morris Heights properties, from walk-ups near Highbridge Park to family homes in the tree-lined streets south of Burnside Avenue.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Morris Heights typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment, severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free quotes and inspect your property to give you an accurate estimate before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, complete elimination may take 2-3 weeks as flea eggs hatch and are exposed to the treatment. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all life stages are eliminated for long-term results.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Morris Heights apartment during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend that all people and pets vacate the premises for 2-4 hours during and immediately after treatment. You'll need to remove or cover food items, and we'll provide specific preparation instructions. Our treatments are safe when applied properly, and you can return once the products have dried.

faqs.question: Can fleas come back after professional treatment?
faqs.answer: While our treatments are highly effective, re-infestation can occur if your pets go outdoors or if neighboring units in your Morris Heights building have fleas. We recommend treating all pets with veterinarian-approved flea prevention, regular vacuuming, and washing pet bedding frequently. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to prevent future infestations.
